protein_name: Guanine nucleotide-binding proteins (G proteins) are involved as modulators or transducers in various transmembrane signaling systems. The G(o) protein function is not clear. Stimulated by RGS14. Belongs to the G-alpha family. G(i/o/t/z) subfamily. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
